description: This Kotlin source file defines an interface 'TokenStore' for managing storage of authentication tokens and a class 'EncryptedPrefsTokenStore' that implements this interface using Android's EncryptedSharedPreferences with security features like MasterKey for encryption. It provides functions for saving, loading, clearing, and checking the existence of tokens securely.

classes.name: EncryptedPrefsTokenStore
classes.description: Implementation of TokenStore that uses EncryptedSharedPreferences to securely store session tokens, utilizing Android's Keystore system for encryption.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Saves session tokens securely into shared preferences.

methods.name: loadOrNull
methods.description: Loads session tokens from shared preferences; returns null if none are found or an error occurs.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears all stored tokens from shared preferences.

methods.name: hasTokens
methods.description: Checks if tokens are present in storage.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Factory method to create an instance of EncryptedPrefsTokenStore using the application context.
